chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2653 - وَ سَأَلَ اَلْحَسَنُ اَلصَّيْقَلُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يُؤْذِيهِ ضِرْسُهُ أَ يَقْلَعُهُ قَالَ «نَعَمْ لاَ بَأْسَ بِهِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2653 - Al-Hasan al-Sayqal asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a Muhrim whose tooth is causing him pain: "Can he have it extracted?"
Imam (as) said: "Yes, there is no harm in it."
